Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tyria]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Tyria is a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Tyria is a Champion who wears armor of leather and mail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Tyria is a Champion with Soulbound power suited to capturing enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Tyria uses a silver needle as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Tyria's Soulbound power manifests as gold power pooling around her feet and golden vines made of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Tyria used her Soulbound powers to cast thorny ropes of shining gold toward Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Tyria stumbled out of the fog onto the Steward's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Tyria carries a person in white armor and red hair with a wound on his back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Tyria believes Calder is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Tyria is someone the researchers would report Petal to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Tyria leveled a silver needle at Foster's chest.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Tyria uses golden thorns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Tyria has Soulbound powers.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
